title: Pilot who saw alleged UFO in 2004 reacts to Trump order to release docs related to aliens
description: President Trump says he's ordering the release of government information on aliens and UFO's. One of the most prominent sightings was a 2004 incident when two Navy pilots saw a so-called "Tic Tac" shaped object off the coast of southern California. Alex Dietrich, one of those pilots who saw the alleged UFO, joins CBS News to discuss.

title: 7 Great UFO Movies Nobody Talks About
description: Image courtesy of Bonsai FilmsSince the dawn of civilization, we looked at the night skies and wondered what was hiding among the stars. title: Mystery as UFO vault with 3.8 million files is wiped clean hours after Trump demands alien docs released
description: One of the biggest libraries for declassified government files was mysteriously wiped clean just hours after President Trump promised to release all data related to alien life.

title: Trump, Schumer find rare common ground on releasing UFO files
description: President Donald Trump directed Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and the Pentagon to release the government's files on UFOs, UAPs and 'all other information' related to the phenomena.
